content: Remote OK Data Entry Specialist Assistant Admin Recruitlytixs Hirings <p>Our company is fully dedicated to delivering exceptional products and services to our clients, and to achieve this, we actively seek detail-oriented candidates who excel in data entry and accuracy. If you thrive in a remote work environment and value the opportunity to work independently, we offer an exciting and rewarding opportunity that aligns with your strengths.</p> <p>This is a fully remote position offering flexibility, training, and opportunities for professional growth. If you enjoy organized work, paying attention to details, and working independently, this role may be a great fit for you.</p> Â What You'll Do: Data Entry <ul><li>Enter and update information in company databases and spreadsheets</li><li>Transfer data from documents and digital sources into company systems</li><li>Maintain accurate and organized records</li><li>Ensure information is entered correctly and on time</li><br></ul> Data Review <ul><li>Check data for accuracy and completeness</li><li>Identify and correct errors or duplicate records</li><li>Perform routine quality checks</li><li>Follow company data entry standards and procedures</li><br></ul> Administrative Support <ul><li>Organize digital files and documents</li><li>Assist with preparing simple reports and summaries</li><li>Support data-related requests from internal teams</li><li>Keep records updated and easily accessible</li><br></ul> Data Security <ul><li>Handle sensitive information with confidentiality</li><li>Follow company policies for data protection</li><li>Maintain secure and accurate records</li><li>Ensure compliance with internal procedures</li><br></ul> Â Requirements: <ul><li>Strong attention to detail</li><li>Good typing and computer skills</li><li>Experience with Microsoft Excel, Google Sheets, or similar tools</li><li>Ability to work independently and manage time effectively</li><li>Strong organizational skills</li><li>Reliable internet connection and personal computer</li><li>Good written communication skills</li><li>Previous data entry or administrative experience is a plus</li><br></ul> Â What We Offer: <ul><li>Competitive pay</li><li>Flexible remote work schedule</li><li>Full training and onboarding</li><li>Career development opportunities</li><li>Performance-based incentives</li><li>Supportive and collaborative team environment</li><li>Work-from-home flexibility</li><br></ul> <p>Â </p> <p>We welcome applicants from all https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-data-entry-specialist-assistant-admin-recruitlytixs-hirings-1134681 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Human Resources Assistant Recruitlytixs Hirings <p>Join our dedicated team and play a vital role in supporting our people and workplace culture. As a Remote Human Resources Assistant, you will help ensure smooth HR operations by assisting with employee records, recruitment coordination, onboarding activities, and administrative support.</p> <p>Working remotely, you will contribute to creating a positive employee experience while maintaining accuracy, confidentiality, and professionalism in all HR processes. Your attention to detail, strong organizational skills, and commitment to supporting both employees and management will have a meaningful impact on the success and growth of our organization.</p> <p>Â </p> <p>Â </p> <p><strong>Key Responsibilities (Daily and Ongoing):</strong></p> <ul><li>Maintain and update employee records across HR systems, ensuring accuracy and completeness</li><li>Support onboarding and offboarding processes, including documentation and scheduling</li><li>Prepare HR documents such as contracts, letters, and internal communications</li><li>Respond to basic HR inquiries and route requests to appropriate team members</li><li>Ensure compliance with HR policies, documentation standards, and data privacy requirements</li><li>Organize and maintain digital HR files using standardized naming and filing structures</li><li>Monitor HR workflows, identify gaps or delays, and escalate issues when needed</li><li>Maintain HR trackers and provide updates on task status and pending items</li><li>Assist with audit preparation by ensuring documentation is complete and accessible</li><br></ul> <p>Â </p> <p><strong>Performance Standards:</strong></p> <ul><li>High accuracy when handling employee data and documentation</li><li>Strict confidentiality and responsible handling of sensitive information</li><li>Consistent productivity and timely completion of assigned tasks</li><li>Clear, professional communication and timely updates</li><li>Strong organization across files, trackers, and documentation</li><br></ul> <p>Â </p> <p>Â </p> <p><strong>Requirements:</strong></p> <ul><li>Proficiency with Google Sheets and/or Microsoft Excel, including data entry and formatting</li><li>Strong attention to detail and ability to follow structured workflows and HR procedures</li><li>Clear written communication skills with a professional tone</li><li>Ability to handle confidential information responsibly</li><li>Reliable internet connection and ability to work independently in a remote environment</li><li>Entry-level candidates are encouraged to apply; training and guidance will be provided</li><br></ul> <p>Â </p> <p>Â </p> <p><strong>Benefits:</strong></p> <ul><li>Competitive compensation aligned with experience and performance</li><li>Flexible working schedule within a fully remote environment</li><li>Structured onboarding, training, and ongoing professional development</li><li>Opportunities for career growth within HR and people operations</li><li>Supportive remote team culture with regular feedback and collaboration</li><br></ul> <p>Â </p> <p>Â </p> <p><strong>Career Development and Progression: </strong></p> <p>This role provides a strong foundation in Human Resources and people operations, offering hands-on experience in employee data management, onboarding coordination, compliance processes, and administrative support. High-performing individuals may progress into roles such as HR Coordinator, Talent Acquisition Assistant, HR Generalist, or People Operations Specialist, depending on performance and busines
